rationale: both call sites (cost_graph.py:234, session_store.py:2678) call positionally; an appended default param is a strict superset with zero caller risk, and avoids hand-syncing a duplicated 7-model x 4-field rate table forever
rule: batch pricing: multiplier parameter (e.g. is_batch: bool = False) appended to the end of estimate_cost_usd()'s signature, not a parallel batch rate table
